bids.reasoning: The negotiation has just begun (t=0.0). I will propose my maximum utility values for the issues where our preferences diverge (issues A, B, C, and F). The negotiation is in its very early stages (t=0.02), so I will aim for a very high utility while beginning to explore slightly different combinations.
